_note: Every parameter cites the research phase that selected it. Change nothing without re-running that phase.

universe._source: phase6: diversification is the biggest single improvement (0.36 avg sleeve corr); FX sleeves kept despite weak standalone because they diversify and vol-sizing bounds their damage

signal._source: phase3: whole grid is a flat plateau, 22/55 SMA at 90th percentile already; phase4: no signal family beats the cross; phase8: Monday-open execution unbeaten (lag 2 weeks = signal close -> next Monday open)

sizing._source: phase5: EWMA vol targeting at 10% halves maxDD at unchanged Sharpe; cap 1x = no sleeve leverage

portfolio._source: phase6: equal weight across sleeves; phase11: 0.6x scale brings portfolio to ~6% vol for FTMO headroom

risk_overlays._source: phase11: linear exposure cut flat at -8% dd + 8w vol brake -> maxDD -3.6%, Sharpe 0.94; phase10: risk lives at portfolio level, never per-trade stops (stops <10% MAE kill winners)

ftmo._source: phase11: overlays keep the backtest at -3.6% total DD; halt new rebalances at halt_buffer x each cap as the hard guard

blend._source: phase13b/13c: TF 80% / MR 20% beats pure TF (Sharpe 1.07 vs 0.94, MaxDD -2.7% vs -3.6%, DSR 0.956 vs 0.875). mr_vol_match = sigma_tf/sigma_mr frozen from phase13b (1068w); MR sleeves are ~3x more volatile than the FTMO-scaled TF book, so each scales down by this before the 80/20. Re-run src/phase13b_real_mr_blend.py and update if the ratio drifts.

mt5._source: 8 native FTMO CFDs verified against the live demo terminal (account 1513939714, FTMO-Demo). The 8 ETF-derived sleeves (SPY/QQQ/DIA/IWM/XLK/XLU/XLI/XLB) have no clean CFD and are intentionally absent -> the connector skips any unmapped asset. MR_QQQ/MR_SPY net onto US100/US500 alongside TF's NAS100/SP500. Account is HEDGING mode; connector reconciles net long volume per symbol.

monitoring._source: phase12: every disjoint 5y window scored Sharpe 0.78-1.18; a 3y rolling Sharpe below -0.3 is outside anything seen and means stop and re-research

caveats._source: phase12: DSR < 0.9 - edge probable but not proven beyond multiple-testing doubt. Deploy small, paper-trade first. phase13: do NOT blend with the simple MR sleeve (Sharpe 0.22 dilutes); wait for the dedicated MR program's sleeve.
